title: Scaffold Pi package and ticks runner extension shell
description: Create the distributable Pi package skeleton for the Ticks orchestrator extension, following docs/projects/2026-07-09-pi-orchestrator-extension/SPEC.md. Add a root package manifest or equivalent package-local manifest with pi.skills and pi.extensions entries, create extensions/ticks-runner/, and register /ticks-plan, /ticks-run, /ticks-status, and /ticks-dashboard commands with safe dry-run/status placeholder behavior. Do not implement child execution yet.
acceptance_criteria: Pi package manifest references skills/ticks and extensions/ticks-runner. Extension loads in Pi and registers all four slash commands. /ticks-status returns a useful no-runs summary. Existing tests/builds still pass.
closed_reason: Completed: added Pi package manifest plus extensions/ticks-runner scaffold registering /ticks-plan, /ticks-run, /ticks-status, /ticks-dashboard, and /ticks help; dry-run graph/worktree planning, status collection, and dashboard overlay/dump scaffolding load under pi -e; go test ./... passes
